name: Cliff Question
summary: End on an unanswered danger that pulls the reader into the next chapter.

beats.label: Cut on an unanswered danger
beats.intent: leave a danger unresolved at the chapter break

effects.text: the reader is carried into the next chapter

examples.text: The seal was already broken — and the cell beyond it was empty.

name: Sudden Reversal
summary: A last-line fact flips the meaning of the whole scene.

beats.label: Last-line meaning flip
beats.intent: reverse the scene's meaning at the cut

effects.text: the reader reinterprets the scene and reads on

examples.text: She finally trusted him — which was exactly what he had been waiting three years for.

name: Impending Threat
summary: A named danger is now inbound, not yet arrived.

beats.label: Threat declared inbound
beats.intent: name a danger that has not yet landed

effects.text: the reader anticipates the threat's arrival

examples.text: By dawn the army would be at the gates, and the gates would not hold.

name: Revelation Drop
summary: A secret is half-revealed and withheld at the cut.

beats.label: Half-reveal then cut
beats.intent: expose part of a secret, withhold the rest

effects.text: the reader reads on to learn the rest

examples.text: He turned the locket over. The face inside was her own.

name: Dialogue Bomb
summary: A line of dialogue detonates and the chapter ends on it.

beats.label: Detonating line, then cut
beats.intent: end on a line that reframes everything

effects.text: the reader reels and reads on

examples.text: 'You should ask your father,' she said, 'why he buried an empty coffin.'

name: Countdown Started
summary: A deadline or timer is set, framing what follows as a race.

beats.label: Set the deadline
beats.intent: impose a finite window on the goal

effects.text: the reader feels the clock and reads on

examples.text: Three days. After that, the offer — and the city — would be gone.

name: Unexpected Arrival
summary: A person who should not be here walks in at the cut.

beats.label: Impossible arrival
beats.intent: introduce someone who should not be present

effects.text: the reader needs to know who and why

examples.text: The door opened, and the man they had buried last winter stepped inside.

name: Choice Forced
summary: The POV is cornered into an irreversible decision at the cut.

effects.text: the reader reads on for the decision

examples.text: Two doors, one key, and the water already at his knees.

name: Power Glimpsed
summary: A hidden capability flashes, unexplained, at the cut.

beats.label: Unexplained power flash
beats.intent: reveal a capability without explaining it

examples.text: For one heartbeat the frightened clerk's eyes burned gold — then the lamp went out.

name: Betrayal Hinted
summary: A trusted figure shows a crack of doubt at the cut.

beats.label: Crack of doubt
beats.intent: show a trusted figure's hidden disloyalty

effects.text: the reader distrusts the figure and reads on

examples.text: Her oldest friend smiled, agreed — and slipped the second key into her own sleeve.

name: Mystery Deepened
summary: A new clue contradicts the assumed answer at the cut.

beats.label: Contradicting clue
beats.intent: overturn the assumed answer with a new clue

effects.text: the reader re-opens the question and reads on

examples.text: The dead man's handwriting was fresh — and dated tomorrow.

name: Loss Imminent
summary: Something the POV loves is about to be taken at the cut.

beats.label: Loss on the brink
beats.intent: place a cherished thing at the edge of being lost

effects.text: the reader fears the loss and reads on

examples.text: The healer shook her head. There was, she said, only enough for one of the children.

name: Identity Teased
summary: A hint at someone's true name or role, left unresolved at the cut.

beats.label: Identity hinted
beats.intent: hint at a true identity without confirming it

effects.text: the reader reads on to learn who they truly are

examples.text: The beggar pulled back his hood, and the guards fell to their knees.
